overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxurious modern penthouse apartment in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring floor-to-ceiling windows with a city view, minimalist interior design with marble and wood accents, and moody blue-hour lighting. The camera smoothly explores the space, revealing high-end furnishings, a vertical garden wall, and ambient lighting features.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse corridor with panoramic city views

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the corridor beside the panoramic windows, observing the cityscape outside

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling glass windows offering view of the city skyline
distant city buildings visible through the windows in blue hour light
polished dark marble flooring with subtle red accent lines
wooden slat ceiling panels running along the corridor
tall white rectangular object, possibly a trash receptacle or air purifier

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, luxurious corridor with panoramic windows on the left revealing a cityscape at blue hour. The camera moves forward along dark marble flooring, passing a white pedestal object on the right, with wooden slat ceilings above.

scene_state.functional_zone: main living area with marble feature wall and television

events.description: exiting narrow corridor into open living room with marble walls and TV installation

agents.ego_description: entering the main living area and approaching the marble feature wall with wall-mounted television

entered.detail: large grey marble wall with vertical paneling serving as room divider
large flatscreen television mounted on the marble wall
low wooden console table beneath the television
glass panel door with metallic frame
tall wall covered in green plants and foliage

segments.scene_description: The space opens into a larger living area featuring a dramatic marble feature wall with a wall-mounted TV and console table. The camera moves past glass doors on the right and a vertical garden wall becomes visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: living area with vertical garden and golden accent wall

events.description: turning right toward the floor-to-ceiling windows with slatted blinds

agents.ego_description: walking past the TV area toward the green living wall and golden accent panel, then turning toward the windows

entered.detail: vertical golden slat wall panel with warm metallic finish
tall potted palm plant in the corner
large windows with horizontal blinds overlooking the city
low white platform bed or seating area in the background

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the apartment, the camera passes a golden accent wall and vertical garden, then turns toward floor-to-ceiling windows with slatted blinds. A white platform bed is visible in the background as the space transitions to a more private area.

scene_state.functional_zone: return to TV area with ambient lighting

events.description: completing turn and walking back toward the television area from a new angle
ambient orange lighting strip under the media console becomes prominent as camera approaches

agents.ego_description: turning back toward the TV area and approaching the media console with glowing ambient lighting

entered.detail: low black media console with glossy finish beneath the TV
warm orange LED strip lighting under the media console
glass panel railing with metallic frame

segments.scene_description: The camera completes a loop, turning back to face the television from the opposite direction. The media console with its distinctive ambient orange lighting becomes the focal point as the camera approaches, revealing the marble wall and TV from a new perspective.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a luxurious penthouse that transitions from a narrow, moody corridor into an expansive, open-concept living and private suite. It begins by gliding along dark marble flooring in a sleek hallway, where panoramic windows reveal a cityscape bathed in blue-hour light beneath a wooden slat ceiling. As the corridor opens into the main living area, the camera passes a dramatic marble feature wall and glass doors, gradually bringing a lush vertical garden into view. The movement then carries deeper into the apartment, passing a golden accent wall and floor-to-ceiling slatted blinds before drifting toward a white platform bed in a more private zone. Finally, the camera loops back to face the living space from a new perspective, centering on the media console and its distinctive ambient orange lighting against the marble wall.
